english: the shape of a basket repeatedly woven from bamboo

etymology.description: йӯҡ(йӯҡ) (yГә, "fish") facing each other -> original script of йҒҳ(gГІu) "to meet; to encounter"
etymology.interpretation: The character еҶ“(gГІu) originally depicted two fish with mouths facing each other, symbolizing the idea of meeting or encountering. This ideogrammic representation connects the visual aspect of the character with its meaning.
